channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LUPIN] Lupin Ltd Receives Form-483 with Two Observations from U.S. FDA at Ankleshwar Facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lupin Ltd, a prominent pharmaceutical company, has announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has concluded an inspection at its manufacturing facility in Ankleshwar, India. The inspection, which took place from March 02, 2026 to March 07, 2026, resulted in the issuance of a Form-483 with two observations. The company has committed to addressing these observations and responding to the U.S. FDA within the specified timeframe. Lupin is dedicated to maintaining compliance with Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) standards across all its facilities.

  • U.S. FDA inspection conducted at Lupin's Ankleshwar facility from March 02, 2026 to March 07, 2026
  • Form-483 with two observations issued by U.S. FDA
  • Lupin committed to addressing observations and responding to U.S. FDA within stipulated timeframe
  • Company dedicated to maintaining CGMP standards across all facilities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LUPIN LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [ARUNIS] Arunis Abode Ltd. Withdraws Proposed Acquisition of DBJ Multi Services Private Limited and Preferential Issue
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Arunis Abode Ltd. has announced the withdrawal of its proposed acquisition of DBJ Multi Services Private Limited and the proposed preferential issue. The decision was made following an internal review and reassessment of the commercial and strategic considerations of the transaction. The company will not proceed further with these transactions.

  • Arunis Abode Ltd. has decided to withdraw its proposed acquisition of DBJ Multi Services Private Limited
  • The decision was made following an internal review and reassessment of the commercial and strategic considerations
  • The proposed preferential issue has also been withdrawn
  • The company will not proceed further with these transactions
  • This announcement has been made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arunis Abode Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SUPRAP] Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd Announces Rights Issue of ¥ 5000.00 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd has approved the offer and issuance of equity shares for an amount not exceeding ¥ 5000.00 Lakhs by way of a rights issue. The rights issue of 21739130 Rights Equity Shares will open on March 20, 2026, and close on March 27, 2026. The record date for the rights issue is March 12, 2026. The rights issue price is ₹ 323 per Rights Equity Share. The company has made necessary arrangements with NSDL and CDSL for credit of REs in the respective demat account of the eligible equity shareholders. The renunciation can be done using the secondary market platform of the Stock Exchanges or through an off-market transfer within the timelines mentioned in the table. The company will file a Letter of Offer with BSE Limited.

  • Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd approves a rights issue of ¥ 5000.00 Lakhs
  • The rights issue of 21739130 Rights Equity Shares will open on March 20, 2026, and close on March 27, 2026
  • The record date for the rights issue is March 12, 2026
  • The rights issue price is ₹ 323 per Rights Equity Share
  • The company has made necessary arrangements with NSDL and CDSL for credit of REs in the respective demat account of the eligible equity shareholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Supra Pacific Management Consultancy Ltd | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [SUPRAP] Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd Announces Rights Issue of Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd has announced a rights issue of equity shares. The company will offer 21,739,130 equity shares at a price of ₹ 323 (including a premium of ₹ 13) per share, aggregating to ₹ 50,000.00 Lakhs. The record date for the rights issue is March 12, 2026. The rights issue period is from March 20, 2026 to March 27, 2026. The company's current outstanding equity shares are 3,32,87,741 and post-rights issue, it will be 5,50,26,871, assuming full subscription.

  • Supra Pacific Financial Services Ltd announces a rights issue of equity shares
  • Offer of 21,739,130 equity shares at a price of ₹ 323 per share
  • Aggregating to ₹ 50,000.00 Lakhs
  • Record date for the rights issue is March 12, 2026
  • Rights issue period is from March 20, 2026 to March 27, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Supra Pacific Management Consultancy Ltd | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [MKEXIM] M.K. Exim (India) Ltd: Murli Wadhumal Dialani Acquires Shares Worth 0.038%
item.description:
M.K. Exim (India) Ltd has received a disclosure from Mr. Murli Wadhumal Dialani, Director of the Company, under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of shares by Mr. Dialani and his Persons Acting in Concert (PAC). The total shares held by Mr. Dialani and his PACs before the acquisition was 9.493%, which has increased to 9.531% after the acquisition.

  • Mr. Murli Wadhumal Dialani has acquired shares of M.K. Exim (India) Ltd worth 0.038%.
  • The total shares held by Mr. Dialani and his PACs before the acquisition was 9.493%, which has increased to 9.531% after the acquisition.
  • No shares were acquired in the nature of encumbrance.
  • The acquisition was not through open market, public issue, rights issue, preferential allotment, inter-se transfer, or encumbrance.
  • The equity share capital of M.K. Exim (India) Ltd is Rs. 40,36,72,500 comprising 4,03,67,250 shares of Rs.10/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: M.K. Exim (India) Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MKEXIM] M.K. Exim (India) Ltd: Murli Wadhumal Dialani Discloses Securities Holding as per SEBI Regulations
item.description:
M.K. Exim (India) Ltd's Director, Murli Wadhumal Dialani, has disclosed his holdings of the company's securities under Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The disclosure includes the acquisition of 3,847,477 shares, increasing his holding to 9.531%. The transaction, which took place on 6th March 2026, does not include taxes, brokerage, or any other charges.

  • Murli Wadhumal Dialani discloses his holdings under SEBI regulations.
  • 3,847,477 shares of M.K. Exim (India) Ltd. acquired.
  • Post-acquisition, holding increases to 9.531%.
  • Transaction valued at approximately ₹206,00,000.
  • No taxes, brokerage, or other charges included in the transaction value.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: M.K. Exim (India) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ABRIL] Abril Paper Tech Ltd Board Meeting Scheduled for March 11, 2026
item.description:
Abril Paper Tech Ltd has informed the BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the company is scheduled on 11th March 2026. The meeting will be held at the registered office situated at 238/3, SHIVA IND. ESTATE, JOLVA, TA. PALSANA, JOLWA, SURAT, PALSANA, GUJARAT, INDIA, 394305. The agenda of the meeting includes transacting other business and any other business with the permission of the Chairperson.

  • Abril Paper Tech Ltd Board Meeting Scheduled for March 11, 2026
  • The meeting will be held at the registered office in Jolva, Gujarat
  • The agenda includes transacting other business
  • The meeting will also include any other business with the permission of the Chairperson

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abril Paper Tech Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TRUECOLORS] True Colors Ltd Expands Renewable Energy Portfolio; Solar Capacity to Reach ~4.5 MW
item.description:
🔥 Trending

True Colors Ltd. has initiated the development of a solar power project with an installed capacity of approximately 2.5 MW for captive consumption. Upon completion, the Company's total installed solar capacity is expected to reach approximately 4.5 MW. This initiative is expected to support the Company’s long-term strategy of improving energy sustainability, operational resilience, and cost efficiency in manufacturing operations.

  • True Colors Ltd. is expanding its renewable energy portfolio with a 2.5 MW solar power project for captive consumption.
  • Upon completion, the Company's total installed solar capacity is expected to reach approximately 4.5 MW.
  • This initiative is part of the Company's long-term strategy to strengthen energy sustainability, operational resilience, and cost competitiveness across its manufacturing operations.
  • The proposed solar power project is expected to be commissioned starting from June 2026, subject to execution timelines and completion of applicable regulatory procedures.
  • Upon completion, approximately 60% of the Company’s total energy requirements will be met through solar power.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: True Colors Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [HOVS] HandsOn Global Management Appoints Mr. Kesavan Nair as Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
HandsOn Global Management (HGM)Ltd has appointed Mr. Kesavan Nair Padmanabhan as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a term of five years, effective March 7, 2026. The appointment is subject to the approval of the Shareholders’ of the Company. Mr. Nair is a seasoned Oil & Gas industry professional with over 40 years of business experience. He is known for building a highly reputable multi-million dollar enterprise from a start-up and helping many businesses in the Health & Technology sectors to raise capital through his extensive network.

  • Appointment of Mr. Kesavan Nair Padmanabhan as Non-Executive Independent Director of HGM
  • Mr. Nair's appointment is for a term of five years, effective March 7, 2026
  • Mr. Nair is a seasoned Oil & Gas industry professional with over 40 years of business experience
  • His appointment is subject to the approval of the Shareholders’ of the Company
  • Mr. Nair has helped many businesses in the Health & Technology sectors to raise capital through his extensive network

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HOV SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GALACTICO] Galactico Corporate Services Ltd Subsidiary Allots Optionally Convertible Redeemable Debentures (OCRDs) worth Rs. 5,50,00,000
item.description:
Galactico Corporate Services Ltd's subsidiary, Instant Finserve Private Limited, has allotted Optionally Convertible Redeemable Debentures (OCRDs) amounting to Rs. 5,50,00,000 (Rupees Five Crore Fifty Lakhs Only) to Galactico Corporate Services Limited. The allotment, consisting of 55,000 debentures of Rs. 1000/- each, was approved by the members of Instant Finserve Private Limited in their meeting. Additionally, in a separate board meeting, Instant Finserve Private Limited redeemed Optionally Convertible Debentures (OCDs) of the same amount to Mrs. Charushila Lathi, a debenture holder, in accordance with the term and conditions of their issue.

  • Instant Finserve Private Limited allotted OCRDs worth Rs. 5,50,00,000 to Galactico Corporate Services Limited.
  • The allotment was approved by the members of Instant Finserve Private Limited in their meeting.
  • Instant Finserve Private Limited also redeemed OCDs worth Rs. 5,50,00,000 to Mrs. Charushila Lathi.
  • The redemption was carried out in accordance with the term and conditions of their issue.
  • The transactions involve a significant investment of Rs. 5,50,00,000.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Galactico Corporate Services Ltd | Category: Investment
